title: Epic: Prophylactic Threat Evaluation
description: Modify Null Move Pruning to store identified opponent threats. Reward moves in the actual search that actively prevent or neutralize the identified threats.

title: Epic: Fortress Seeking & Recognition
description: Add a FortressPotential heuristic to recognize locked pawn chains and blockaded positions. Steer the game toward these fortresses when at a material disadvantage.

title: Epic: Formalize the Overextension Trigger
description: Implement an OverextensionEvaluator to penalize unsupported opponent aggression. Shift engine behavior dynamically to counterattack when opponent overextends.

title: Epic: Move Clustering and Plan-Based Search
description: Group candidate moves into strategic clusters based on 'Position DNA'. Search representative moves first and apply LMR or pruning to remaining cluster moves if the representative fails.

title: Epic: Implement Decision Compression in Search
description: Introduce a StrategicEntropy or MobilityVariance metric to evaluate opponent's meaningful plans and restrict their safe mobility. Add search extensions for highly restrictive moves.

title: Implement Swindle Mode
description: Phase 4: When losing significantly, avoid piece trades (especially Queens) and seek complex positions to maximize the opponent's chance of making a mistake.

title: Implement Overextension Detection and King Shield Immutability
description: Penalize overextended pawn storms when attacking without sufficient piece support. Heavily penalize moving the pawns forming the king shield to enforce defensive solidity.

title: Implement Blockade Scoring and Fortress Mode
description: Reward placing minor pieces in front of passed pawns (blockade). Add a Fortress Mode that scales down evaluation if losing (-2.00) but moving into locked structures or opposite-colored bishops, seeking draws.

title: Implement Null Move Threat Extraction
description: Modify Null Move Pruning to capture the opponent's high-scoring PV and prioritize candidate moves that disrupt this sequence (Prophylactic Extensions).

title: Implement Defensive Cluster Bonus in Evaluation
description: Add a coordination bonus to the evaluation function when pieces are compactly positioned and mutually protecting each other. This discourages loose pieces and fortifies against strong engines like Stockfish and DeepBlue.

title: Train the NNUE network
description: Develop a script to train the 768->32->1 network on a larger dataset of Stockfish-evaluated positions.
close_reason: Network is already pretrained and loads successfully into the engine.

title: Add Futility Pruning and Advanced Heuristics
description: Implement Futility Pruning, Delta Pruning, and History/Killer heuristics for safer, deeper search pruning.
close_reason: Futility Pruning, Null Move Pruning, LMR, and Aspiration Windows are fully implemented in AlphaBeta.ts

title: Implement Staged Move Generation
description: Generate and test Transposition Table moves first, then captures, and finally quiet moves to drastically improve early beta cutoffs.
close_reason: Implemented MovePicker with Staged Move Generation and integrated MoveOrderer into AlphaBetaSearch. Tests pass and performance (time to depth) is vastly improved.

title: Optimize Move Generation & Legality Checking
description: Perform hot-spot profiling to optimize loops, bitboard sliding ray computations, and in-check detection to increase raw NPS.

title: Elo & Performance Scaling
description: Drastically scale engine Elo through hot-spot optimization, staged move generation, advanced pruning heuristics, and mature NNUE training.
close_reason: Completed in-place move making, achieving ~50k NPS with NNUE.

title: Implement NNUE
description: Integrate CPU-friendly neural network for evaluation
close_reason: Implemented basic CPU-friendly NNUE architecture (768->32->1) with an incrementally updated Accumulator attached to Board state. Integrated NnueEvaluator behind a toggle flag in Evaluator.

title: Automated Evaluation Tuning
description: Implement Texel's Tuning Method for piece square tables and weights
close_reason: Implemented Texel's Tuning Method script (scripts/texel-tuning.ts) to automatically optimize evaluation weights using local search against a dataset of labeled chess positions (EPD). Added 'tune' command to package.json.

title: Transition to Bitboard Representation
description: Use BigInt or two 32-bit integers to replace 64-element array
close_reason: Implemented bitboard representation with bigint. Added Bitboard.ts utilities, AttackTables.ts with precomputed attacks, augmented Board.ts with hybrid array+bitboard storage, rewrote AttackDetector.ts and SEE to use bitboard lookups.

title: Implement Static Exchange Evaluation (SEE)
description: Add SEE to MoveOrdering and QuiescenceSearch
close_reason: Implemented SEE and integrated into MoveOrdering and QuiescenceSearch

title: Chess Engine Enhancements
close_reason: Completed all tasks under the Chess Engine Enhancements epic: SEE, Bitboards, Evaluation Tuning, and NNUE integration.
